description: CNV run comparison v3: metrics health scorecard, per-metric ECharts overlays with elapsed-time normalization, VMI latency grouped bars, and historical trend context using Business Charts

settings.script: def nsCount = 1; def vmsPerNs = _value; if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].size() > 0) { nsCount = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].value); } if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].size() > 0) { vmsPerNs = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].value); } return nsCount * vmsPerNs;

def nsCount = 1; def vmsPerNs = _value; if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].size() > 0) { nsCount = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].value); } if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].size() > 0) { vmsPerNs = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].value); } return nsCount * vmsPerNs;

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuidA AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND NOT jobName.keyword: shutdown-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuidB AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND NOT jobName.keyword: shutdown-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuidA AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND NOT jobName.keyword: shutdown-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuidB AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND NOT jobName.keyword: shutdown-vms

list.label: Metrics
list.name: metricToCompare
list.query: nodeCPU : nodeCPU,nodeMemoryAvailable : nodeMemoryAvailable,nodeDiskWrittenBytes : nodeDiskWrittenBytes,nodeDiskReadBytes : nodeDiskReadBytes,kubevirtCPU : kubevirtCPU,kubevirtMemory : kubevirtMemory,kubevirtAPIRequestRate : kubevirtAPIRequestRate,kubevirtWorkQueueDepth : kubevirtWorkQueueDepth,kubevirtWorkQueueAddRate : kubevirtWorkQueueAddRate,APIRequestRate : APIRequestRate,99thEtcdDiskWalFsyncDurationSeconds : 99thEtcdDiskWalFsyncDurationSeconds,99thEtcdDiskBackendCommitDurationSeconds : 99thEtcdDiskBackendCommitDurationSeconds,etcdDBPhysicalSizeBytes : etcdDBPhysicalSizeBytes,rxNetworkBytes : rxNetworkBytes,txNetworkBytes : txNetworkBytes,containerCPU-Prometheus : containerCPU-Prometheus

title: CNV Run Comparison v3
